onBoard.description1: Track all your sea and air shipments, and enjoy a professional shipping experience that combines speed, security and organization in one place.
onBoard.description2: We provide reliable sea and air shipping solutions, with accurate management for every shipment stage to ensure the best delivery time and highest quality.
onBoard.description3: Stay updated with your shipment status through real-time tracking and instant notifications, so you always know where your shipment is and its latest updates.

service.weProvide: We provide comprehensive and reliable shipping solutions designed to meet all your business needs worldwide
service.airFreightDesc: Fast and secure air shipping solutions reaching more than 200 countries with live tracking available around the clock.
service.seaFreightDesc: The most economical option for large shipments with full and shared container services.
service.expressDeliveryDesc: Door-to-door delivery in record time within major cities with guaranteed delivery.
service.storageDesc: Storage centers equipped with the latest technology for inventory management and efficient local distribution.
service.landTransportDesc: A modern fleet of trucks for transporting goods across borders and between cities with complete safety.

car.addYourCar: Add your car now to enjoy its cleanliness with us

car.carLocationHint: This will help us reach you faster
car.deleteCarWarningLinkedOrder: The car “Kia, 2025” you’re trying to delete is linked to an order, so you cannot delete it until the order is completed.
